# Slack webhook morning summary

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Phase | P4: Logging |
| Priority | Should have |
| Status | Not started |
| Est. Effort | Small (1-2h) |
| Dependencies | Daily markdown log (done) |

## Description

Automated morning Slack message summarising yesterday's work. Posted at 09:45 via Slack incoming webhook, generated by a Claude scheduled task.

## Architecture

This is entirely a Claude scheduled task - no Tauri app code needed. Claude reads the daily log, generates a second-person narrative summary, and posts it via Slack webhook.

## Requirements

1. **Slack incoming webhook** - URL stored in `~/.taskflow/config.toml` under `[slack]` section
2. **Claude scheduled task** - Runs at 09:45 weekdays only
3. **Summary format** - Second-person narrative ("Yesterday you worked on X, completed Y...")
4. **Day-of-week logic:**
   - Saturday/Sunday: Don't run at all (skip silently)
   - Monday: Read Friday's log (most recent working day). If no Friday log exists, post "No activity logged on Friday"
   - Tuesday-Friday: Read yesterday's log. If no log exists, post "No activity logged yesterday - heads up"
5. **Config** - Webhook URL in config.toml (hardcoded to DM channel for now, configurable channel is a future task)

## Config format

```toml
[slack]
webhook_url = "https://hooks.slack.com/services/T.../B.../..."
```

## Log location

`~/.taskflow/logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md`

## Log format

```markdown
# YYYY-MM-DD

## Summary

## HH:MM - Task Name
- **Mode:** Full/Quick/Urgent
- **Template:** template name
- **Duration:** -
- **Exit notes:** notes here
- **Bookmark:** bookmark here

## Todos

### HH:MM - todo item

## Completed Work
```

## Notes

- The webhook URL needs to be created manually in Slack admin (Incoming Webhooks app) and pasted into config.toml
- Future: move webhook URL and channel to a configurable settings UI
- Future: make the summary format/tone configurable
